import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import json

df = pd.read_csv('input_file_0.csv')

# Preprocessing numeric columns as per rules
# Note: Vietnamese numeric format uses ',' as decimal separator
cols_to_fix = ['returns_over_assets']
for col in df.columns:
    if df[col].dtype == object:
        # Check if the column is one of the numeric ones
        clean_col_name = col.lower().replace(" ", "_").replace("'", "s").replace("-", "_")
        # Just handle all numeric columns as described in rules
        df[col] = df[col].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.')

# Applying numeric conversion
numeric_cols = [
    "branches_ratio", "core_cost", "core_cost_ratio", "cost_income_ratios", 
    "cumulative_gaps_over_total_assets", "employees_ratio", "equity_over_total_assets", 
    "equity_over_total_deposits", "interest_expenses", "interest_incomes", 
    "labour_productivity", "liquid_assets", "liquid_assets_over_total_assets", 
    "liquid_assets_over_total_deposits", "loan_loss_provisions", "loan_loss_provisions_ratio", 
    "net_interest_margin", "network_productivity", "non_interest_expenses", 
    "non_interest_income", "non_performing_loans", "non_performing_loans_ratio", 
    "number_of_branches", "number_of_employees", "occupancy_expenses", 
    "off_balance_sheet_activities", "other_expenses", "other_incomes", 
    "personnel_expenses", "profits_after_tax", "profits_before_tax", 
    "returns_over_assets", "returns_over_equity", "total_assets", 
    "total_assets_ratio", "total_cost", "total_cost_ratio", "total_deposits", 
    "total_deposits_ratio", "total_fixed_assets", "total_income", 
    "total_income_ratio", "total_loans", "total_loans_ratio", 
    "total_operating_expenses", "total_shareholder_s_equity", "year"
]

for col in df.columns:
    # Match the provided column names with the numeric_cols list (normalized names)
    match_name = col.lower().replace(" ", "_").replace("'", "s").replace("-", "_").strip()
    if match_name in numeric_cols:
        df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors='coerce')

# Filter for ABB in 2006
val_row = df[(df['Bank Code'] == 'ABB') & (df['Year'] == 2006)]
roa_val = val_row['Returns Over Assets'].values[0]

# Calculate tanh
result = np.tanh(roa_val)

print(json.dumps([[round(result, 2)]], ensure_ascii=False))
